plugins.name: value-estimates
plugins.description: Generate a value-based estimate report: pull tickets delivered in a date range from daily reports, cross-reference GitLab issues for effort, and compare to Harvest actuals.

plugins.name: youtube-playlist-builder
plugins.description: Build YouTube music playlists from a mood/likes/dislikes descriptor. Claude curates the tracklist, searches each track on YouTube, and assembles the playlist.
